title: shalem #8003
definition:
1) complete, safe, peaceful, perfect, whole, full, at peace
    1a) complete
        1a1) full, perfect
        1a2) finished
    1b) safe, unharmed
    1c) peace (of covenant of peace, mind)
        1c1) perfect, complete (of keeping covenant relation)
